action.reasoning: Observation: The 7-seed combined GRU ensemble only marginally improved hidden AUC (0.7679169→0.7680010), suggesting same-architecture ensembling is near saturation. Analysis: Remaining time allows a targeted diversity experiment. A BiLSTM is invalid causally, but a unidirectional LSTM with the same DKT interface may provide complementary dynamics to GRU. Decision: train a 3-seed LSTM-DKT ensemble on train/val validation split first, compare validation AUC to GRU, and submit only if promising.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 18 --seeds 101,202,303 --hidden_dim 512 --emb_dim 128 --dropout 0.2 --batch_size 128 --lr 0.001 --weight_decay 1e-5 --out checkpoints/lstm_val.pt --rnn_type lstm && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/lstm_val.pt --output smoke_lstm_val.json

command_output.stderr:
usage: train.py [-h] [--data_dir DATA_DIR] [--epochs EPOCHS]
                [--batch_size BATCH_SIZE] [--lr LR]
                [--weight_decay WEIGHT_DECAY] [--emb_dim EMB_DIM]
                [--hidden_dim HIDDEN_DIM] [--num_layers NUM_LAYERS]
                [--dropout DROPOUT] [--seed SEED] [--seeds SEEDS]
train.py: error: unrecognized arguments: --out checkpoints/lstm_val.pt --rnn_type lstm
